offer: For small law offices processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient invoice generation causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice formatting instead of manual invoice creation using spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient invoice generation from time entries
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small law offices
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to small law offices with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among law offices
try_it: Let users manually enter time entries and select templates
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
Provide one-click export for simple reports
Reduce steps required in onboarding process
